title: Senior Financial Analyst - HDFC Life Insurance Digital Technologies - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - HDFC Life Insurance Digital Technologies - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
HDFC Life Insurance Digital Technologies invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Financial Analyst at our Kolkata location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About HDFC Life Insurance Digital Technologies:
HDFC Life Insurance Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Life Insurance Digital Technologies!
